Bash("D:\\my_report_generator\\env\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
from docxtpl import DocxTemplate
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

# 读取模板文件
template = DocxTemplate\(''template.docx''\)

# 获取XML内容
xml_content = template.docx.part.blob.decode\(''utf-8'', errors=''ignore''\)

# 查找所有包含scope_3_category_7和scope_3_category_8的变量
print\(''模板中的类别7和类别8相关变量:''\)
print\(''='' * 60\)

import re
# 查找所有scope_3_category变量
pattern = r''scope_3_category_[78]_emissions[_a-z]*''
matches = re.findall\(pattern, xml_content\)

unique_vars = sorted\(set\(matches\)\)
for var in unique_vars:
    # 统计出现次数
    count = xml_content.count\(var\)
    print\(f''{var}: 出现 {count} 次''\)
")

Bash("D:\\my_report_generator\\env\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
import openpyxl

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(''test_data.xlsx'', data_only=True\)
sheet = wb[''表1温室气体盘查表'']

print\(''查看范围二相关区域（行100-120）:''\)
for row_num in range\(100, 121\):
    if row_num <= sheet.max_row:
        row = sheet[row_num]
        a_val = row[0].value if len\(row\) > 0 else None
        b_val = row[1].value if len\(row\) > 1 else None
        c_val = row[2].value if len\(row\) > 2 else None
        d_val = row[3].value if len\(row\) > 3 else None
        if a_val or b_val or c_val or d_val:
            print\(f''行{row_num}: A={a_val}, B={b_val}, C={c_val}, D={d_val}''\)
")
